sections.heading: High-Quality CNC Aluminum Prototype Manufacturing
sections.text: High-Quality CNC Aluminum Prototype Manufacturing At JunYing Metal Manufacturing, we specialize in custom CNC milled aluminum prototypes, offering high-precision 6063-T5 aluminum CNC machining services for a wide range of industries. Our OEM CNC milling services for aluminum ensure that every component meets strict tolerances, excellent surface finishes, and fast turnaround times. sections.heading: ? Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
sections.text: ? Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) What is 6063-T5 aluminum, and how does it differ from other aluminum alloys? 6063-T5 aluminum is an extruded aluminum alloy from the 6000 series, primarily composed of magnesium and silicon. It is known for its good corrosion resistance, excellent surface finish, and moderate strength. Compared to 6061-T6 aluminum, 6063-T5 has better formability and anodizing properties but slightly lower strength. What does the “T5” temper designation mean in 6063-T5 aluminum? The T5 temper indicates that the aluminum has been cooled from an elevated temperature shaping process (such as extrusion) and artificially aged to achieve a stable strength level.
